stem: An object was launched upward from a platform. The graph shown models the height above ground, y, in meters, of the object x seconds after it was launched. For which of the following intervals of time was the height of the object increasing for the entire interval?
explanation: The curve rises until it peaks at x = 2 and falls afterward, so the height increases over the whole interval only from x = 0 to x = 2. Each other interval includes part of the descent.
